basic_details.job_title: CNCI Stipendiary Intern Clinical Pharmacist Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: Chittaranjan National Cancer Institute (CNCI) Stipendiary Intern-Clinical Pharmacist Notification 2026 has been released on 17 June 2026 on the official website of CNCI. A total of 4 vacancies have been announced through the CNCI Stipendiary Intern-Clinical Pharmacist Recruitment 2026.

qualification.education_qualification: Pharm. D or M.Pharm (Pharmacy Practice) from an institution approved by the Pharmacy Council of India
qualification.details: Pharm. D or M.Pharm (Pharmacy Practice) from an institution approved by the Pharmacy Council of India. Fresher can apply.

selection_process: Shortlisting Interview Document Verification Merit List
how_to_apply: Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 05-07-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

_labels.notification_pdf: Download CNCI Stipendiary Intern-Clinical Pharmacist Job 2026 Notification PDF

all_official_links.label: Download CNCI Stipendiary Intern-Clinical Pharmacist Job 2026 Notification PDF

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the CNCI Stipendiary Intern-Clinical Pharmacist post?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email is 05-07-2026. Ensure your application reaches the institute before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What are the educational qualifications required for this post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a Pharm. D or M.Pharm (Pharmacy Practice) degree from an institution recognized by the Pharmacy Council of India. Freshers are also eligible to apply.

faq.question: Q3. How many vacancies are available for the Stipendiary Intern-Clinical Pharmacist position?
faq.answer: There are a total of 4 vacancies for the Stipendiary Intern-Clinical Pharmacist post in this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for this position?
faq.answer: The selected candidates will receive a stipend of Rs. 20,000 per month for the duration of their internship.

faq.question: Q5. What is the application mode for CNCI Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The application process for this recruitment is through email. Candidates need to send their applications to the official email address provided in the notification.

faq.question: Q6. What is the selection process for the Stipendiary Intern-Clinical Pharmacist role?
faq.answer: The selection process typically involves shortlisting of applications, followed by an interview, document verification, and finally, the preparation of a merit list.

faq.question: Q7. Is there any application fee for SC/ST and Women candidates?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee for candidates belonging to the SC/ST categories and for Women candidates. The fee is applicable only for General/OBC candidates.

faq.question: Q8. Where is the Chittaranjan National Cancer Institute located?
faq.answer: Chittaranjan National Cancer Institute is located in Kolkata, West Bengal.

faq.question: Q9. Can freshers apply for the Stipendiary Intern-Clinical Pharmacist post?
faq.answer: Yes, the notification explicitly states that freshers are eligible to apply for the Stipendiary Intern-Clinical Pharmacist position.

faq.question: Q10. What documents are required to be attached with the application?
faq.answer: Candidates need to attach self-attested copies of all required documents, including educational certificates, experience certificates (if any), ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
